channel.title: What Is Being Built — Daily Activity Feed
channel.description: Daily updates on open-source automated research tools: commits, releases, and community activity.

item.title: Daily digest — 2026-07-12
item.description:
The open-source research community has seen a surge of activity across multiple projects, with notable updates and connections between them. The `statcheck` and `escicheck` projects have both received administrative updates, with `escicheck` synchronizing its `main` branch with the `escicheckapp` repository. Meanwhile, `docpluck` has made significant progress, resolving test failures and updating documentation, while `coarse` has re-enabled Fable 5 in the model picker. The `regcheck` project has also undergone substantial changes, including splitting precheck and regcheck domains and preparing for production. Additionally, smaller updates have been made to `auto-zcurve` and `output-it-forward`, including revisions to validation notes and the addition of a Chrome Webstore link. These updates demonstrate the community's commitment to ongoing development and improvement, and highlight the interconnectedness of these projects.

24 commits across 2 active repositories this week.

Dormant repos revived: statcheck

Most active:

regcheck19 commits
metacheck5 commits

item.title: statcheck: activity update
item.description:
MicheleNuijten/statcheck

The `feature-non-apa-newer` branch was worked on, where a merge was performed, specifically merging the `feature-non-apa-newer` branch of the repository into itself. The commit message "admin updates" indicates that administrative updates were made on the `feature-non-apa-newer` branch. No other branches were mentioned in the provided commit messages, so the work appears to be isolated to `feature-non-apa-newer`. The merge commit suggests that changes from the same branch were incorporated, but the details of those changes are not specified in the provided commit messages. The "admin updates" commit suggests that the changes were related to administrative tasks, but the specifics are not provided.

⚠ This repository was dormant and has recently become active again.

View all commits →

item.title: regcheck: 9 commits today
item.description:
JamieCummins/regcheck

Work was done on the "staging" branch, where the precheck and regcheck domains were split, as stated in the commit message "split precheck and regcheck domains". The "staging" branch also saw the addition of precheck functionality, with the commit message "add precheck functionality" describing this change. Additionally, the "staging" branch had dimension numbers removed for defaults, with the commit message "remove dimension numbers for defaults" detailing this modification. The "staging" branch further underwent changes to the RR flow, as indicated by the commit message "change RR flow", and also had beta references stripped, as per the commit message "strip beta references". The "staging" branch was also prepared for production in phases, with commits "phase 5 prod prep", "phase 3 prod prep", and "commit phase 2 prod push" describing these preparations, and minor additions were made for preclin, as stated in the commit message "minor additions preclin".

9 commit(s) today:

  • a430ad4 [staging] split precheck and regcheck domains — Jamie Cummins
  • 4e45f4f [staging] add precheck functionality — Jamie Cummins
  • ad6c3aa [staging] remove dimension numbers for defaults — Jamie Cummins
  • c0b987d [staging] change RR flow — Jamie Cummins
  • ffa8ea4 [staging] strip beta references — Jamie Cummins
  • 2751f19 [staging] phase 5 prod prep — Jamie Cummins
  • 5092647 [staging] minor additions preclin — Jamie Cummins
  • 820b166 [staging] phase 3 prod prep — Jamie Cummins
  • 575f010 [staging] commit phase 2 prod push — Jamie Cummins
  • cfeac5d [staging] roll back RR overkill — Jamie Cummins
  • 35075aa [staging] third phase of RR creation — Jamie Cummins
  • 6d30479 [staging] stage 2 RR dev — Jamie Cummins
  • 60f395c [staging] first phase: registered report mode — Jamie Cummins
  • 2363d45 [staging] small fix — Jamie Cummins
  • 8277b4d [staging] budget-saving changes — Jamie Cummins
  • f8a0f65 [staging] improve specificity on 'missing' judgements — Jamie Cummins
  • f02456c [staging] update default openai model — Jamie Cummins
  • 90c62a8 [staging] aesthetic bug fixes — Jamie Cummins
  • efb74a8 [staging] improve backend handling of insufficient evidence — Jamie Cummins
  • 1f6986b [staging] remove sign-up — Jamie Cummins

View all commits →
